title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join

our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design,

prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast

paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)




What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidates can share their CV on sanobar.s@myfrido.com

Show more

title: Human Resources (HR) Trainee in Navi Mumbai, Bangalore, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Delhi, Pune
description:
As a Human Resources Trainee at Spinfluence Technology, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in various HR functions while working in a dynamic and innovative tech company. Your role will involve assisting with recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and other HR activities.

Key Responsibilities Include


Assisting with recruitment process, including posting job ads, screening resumes, and scheduling interviews.
Conducting new employee orientation and assisting with the onboarding process.
Maintaining employee records and updating HR databases.
Assisting with employee relations issues and conflict resolution.
Assisting with performance management processes, including performance reviews and goal setting.
Providing support for HR projects and initiatives.
Utilizing MS-Office, MS-Word, and MS-Excel for various HR tasks and projects.


If you are a motivated and organized individual with a passion for HR and technology, this is the perfect opportunity for you to kickstart your career in HR. Join us at Spinfluence Technology and be a part of our dynamic team!

About Company: Spinfluence Technology delivers innovative IT consulting services in Sitecore, .NET, Oracle, and SAP to help businesses transform, scale, and thrive in the digital era. We specialize in providing end-to-end IT consulting services tailored to your unique business needs. With expertise in Sitecore for personalized digital experiences, .NET for scalable application development, Oracle for robust database solutions, and SAP for seamless enterprise integration, we empower businesses to achieve their goals efficiently and effectively. Our team of certified professionals is dedicated to delivering innovative, future-ready solutions that drive growth, enhance productivity, and ensure long-term success.

title: Human Resource Trainee
company: Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd
description:
Company Description

Western India Electromedical Systems Pvt Ltd is a healthcare HVAC company specializing in the design and installation of Modular Operation Theatres, Modular ICU/PICU/NICU, and IVF labs. Established in 1997, the company has been at the forefront of creating infection-free zones and highly sterile environments for critical healthcare facilities.




Role Description

We are seeking a full-time Human Resource Trainee to join our team at our office located in Chinchwad, Pune District. The role will involve supporting daily HR operations, learning about HR policies, assisting in personnel management, managing employee benefits, and contributing to the development and implementation of HR initiatives. The trainee will gain hands-on experience in all facets of HR management in an on-site setting.




Qualifications

Knowledge of Human Resources (HR) and HR Management practices
Understanding of HR Policies and Employee Benefits administration
Basic skills in Personnel Management
Strong organizational and time management skills
Excellent verbal and written communication abilities
Proficiency with office software (e.g., Word, Excel, and PowerPoint)
Relevant educational background in HR or Business Administration
Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment




Send your resume with cover letter :

Mail Id - hr@wiespl.com

Contact No. - 9881151272

title: Microelectronics Structural and Thermal Integrity Internship
description:
Job Title: Microelectronics Structural and Thermal Integrity Internship

Introduction:

Drive technology innovations that shape the way we live and connect. Our technology drives the Era of Pervasive Intelligence, where smart tech and AI are seamlessly woven into daily life. From self-driving cars and health-monitoring smartwatches to renewable energy systems that efficiently distribute clean power, Synopsys creates high-performance silicon chips that help build a healthier, safer, and more sustainable world.

Internship Experience:

At Synopsys, interns dive into real-world projects, gaining hands-on experience while collaborating with our passionate teams worldwide—and having fun in the process! You'll have the freedom to share your ideas, unleash your creativity, and explore your interests. This is your opportunity to bring your solutions to life and work with cutting-edge technology that shapes not only the future of innovation but also your own career path. Join us and start shaping your future today!

Mission Statement:

Our mission is to fuel today’s innovations and spark tomorrow’s creativity. Together, we embrace a growth mindset, empower one another, and collaborate to achieve our shared goals. Every day, we live by our values of Integrity, Excellence, Leadership, and Passion, fostering an inclusive culture where everyone can thrive—both at work and beyond.

What You’ll Be Doing:


Contributing to the development and optimization of high-performance ICs/3DICs/HBMs, microelectronic systems
Work on new simulation methodologies, troubleshoot and benchmarks, and update industry best practices
Create technical content around the area of semiconductor, manufacturing and structural integrity
Perform a literature search to locate relevant publications using Synopsys S&A solutions or competitive products, as well as experimental data
Explore AI/ML techniques applicable to this field to improve fidelity, turnaround time, etc.


What You’ll Need:


Currently pursuing or recently completed a Master’s or PhD in Mechanical Engineering, Materials, or a related field
Strong fundamentals in solid mechanics and materials behavior
Basic experience with finite element analysis and numerical modeling
Experience with Ansys Mechanical, LS Dyna, or similar simulation tools (preferred)
Proficiency in Python and strong technical writing skills, basic familiarity with AI/ML techniques (preferred)
Passion for technology, eagerness to learn, and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment


Key Program Facts:


Program Length: 3 months
Location: Pune (India)
Working Model: 100% onsite
Full-Time/Part-Time: Full-Time
Start Date: May-July 2026


Equal Opportunity Statement:

Synopsys is committed to creating an inclusive workplace and is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome all qualified applicants to apply, regardless of age, color, family or medical leave, gender identity or expression, marital status, disability, race and ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by local laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation during the application process, please reach out to us.
Show more

title: EIC Apprentice
description:
Job Title

EIC Apprentice

Job Description Summary

Apprenticeship is a Govt Initiated Program that entails your growth by gaining exposure on Real- Live-Projects.

Job Description

Apprenticeship Program: Project Development Service

Responsibilities


Assist in design, drawings, and development: Assist senior engineers in reviewing designing basis report, drawings, developing, and implementing in projects.
Conduct site inspections: Conduct site inspections to monitor progress in daily basis and ensure compliance with safety regulations.
Prepare reports and documents: Prepare daily progress reports, documents, and presentations to communicate project progress.
Collaborate with teams: Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including architects, contractors, and other stakeholders.
Develop project management skills: Develop project management skills, including scheduling, budgeting, and resource allocation.
Stay updated with industry trends: Stay updated with industry trends, best practices, and new technologies and machineries.
Assist in testing and commissioning: Assist in testing and commissioning of civil, electrical & mechanical engineering systems.
Participate in training and development programs: Participate in training and development programs to enhance skills and knowledge.
Maintain a safe and healthy work environment: Maintain a safe and healthy work environment, adhering to company safety policies and procedures.
Assist in quality control: Assist in ensuring that civil, electrical & mechanical engineering projects meet quality, safety, and environmental standards.


Qualifications Graduation


Bachelor's degree (B.Tech Civil degree or Engineering)


What are we looking for?


Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Strong data analytical and mathematical skills.
MS Office expertise
Hardworking and determined


INCO: “Cushman & Wakefield”

title: TOOLBOX -BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN
description:
Toolbox - BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

Toolbox Studio is a media organization in India, specialized in Visual Effects & Animation, TV Commercials, Motion Graphics and Corporate Video Production. We are designed to provide solutions to a range of industries that include Film, Broadcast, Online, Digital and spectrum of corporate sectors such as IT, Education, Hospitality, Automobile and Lifestyle. Along with having international experience across 3 continents, Toolbox is firmly rooted with its extensive home experience that places us uniquely to deliver international as well as domestic projects with equal professionalism. www.toolbox-studio.com

Job Title / Designation: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT INTERN

We are looking for a detail-oriented Business Development Intern with a strong focus on CRM management and process support. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with data, maintaining structured workflows, and supporting business growth initiatives through organized systems. This will be a 3-month internship which can be converted to full time employment based on performance.

Key Responsibilities


Maintain and update CRM with accurate client, studio, and project information
Track incoming inquiries and potential opportunities within the VFX pipeline
Research production houses, studios, and OTT platforms for potential collaboration
Organize and segment client data based on geography, project type, and service requirements (Roto, Paint, Comp, etc.)
Monitor communication history, follow-ups, and engagement timelines in the CRM
Assist in preparing pitch decks, company profiles, and bid documentation
Support coordination between business development and production team
Identify gaps in data/processes and suggest improvements for better workflow efficiency

Requirements


Strong attention to detail and data organization skills
Basic understanding of the VFX pipeline (Roto, Paint, Compositing, etc.) is a plus
Familiarity with CRM systems and structured workflows
Good communication and coordination skills
Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets

Work Experience Required

0-1 Years of Experience (of handling international clients), Freshers can apply.

Education: Recently completed a degree

Location: Baner, Balewadi High Street,Pune

Languages

English, Hindi (bilingual / fluent proficiency), Marathi (Working knowledge proficiency)

Any Other Skill Set


Interest in the VFX, film, or OTT industry
Experience with research on production companies
Basic understanding of bidding and project coordination in VFX

title: Trainee, Human Resources
description:
Position

Job Title: Trainee, Human Resources

Reports to: Coordinator, Human Resources

Job Purpose

The Dior Corporate Trainee participates in a program designed to identify and develop future talent for the organization. By working closely with their assigned Department, the Trainee supports the organization’s short and long-term objectives through day-to-day administrative and long-term project work. Trainees across departments will collaborate to develop initiatives to improve business results and present a project to the Executive Leadership Team. The HR Trainee will support the Corporate HR team and help impact the organization through supporting a variety of generalist responsibilities.

Job responsibilities

Tasks And Responsibilities


Support the candidate administration process, including the secure handling of applications and related documents, while providing regular progress updates to the Talent Acquisition, HR Generalist and Compensation & Benefits teams.
Update organizational charts, office floor plan, track new hires and departures, send monthly reports and draft offer letters with accuracy and attention to detail.
Collaborate with cross-functional partners across departments to guarantee accuracy and alignment in employee titles and compensation packages.
Input key new-hire data into internal HRIS platforms to provide up-to-date information
Participate in HR operations projects as needed, including the internal employee referral program and organizational announcements.
Contribute to Dior's employer branding efforts by ensuring elevated and professional communication with new hires and maintaining a welcoming environment for all visitors.


Profile

Skills & Competencies


Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a highly complex work environment
Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion with sensitive information
Takes initiative and works to resolve issues through communication, flexibility & collaboration with partnering teams
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills to ensure important documents are collected and completed accurately for company purpose
Excellent interpersonal skills and communication skills, both verbal and written
Ability to deliver information clearly and concisely


Requirements


At least 6 months of prior HR experience
Full-time, 12-month program from May 2026 through May 2027
Available to work M-F, 9-6pm, Friday work from home
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook)


Additional information

The appointed candidate will be offered a salary of $20 per hour, plus potential eligibility to participate in the Company's medical benefits plan, commuter benefits, and 401k plans with employer contributions.

Additional Information

Christian Dior was the designer of dreams. In founding his House in 1947, marked by the revolution of the New Look, he metamorphosed his reveries into wonderful creations. Christian Dior Couture, the House of Dreams, is recognized for its French heritage and vibrant culture sublimating its unique Savoir-faire and Creativity through empowering "metiers d’art”. Our Maison is a destination for sustainable growth & success where we shape the future of our Talents in a positive, authentic & generous environment. We bloom & deliver excellence with passion, determination, courage & optimism to offer meaningful & daring codes.

Christian Dior Couture is part of the LVMH Group, where People Make the Difference. We value, celebrate, and welcome each unique talent and strive to create an inclusive environment providing all employees a sense of purpose. Beyond your role, we recognize the importance and passion of creating communities with shared values that enrich and impact beyond our organization. As an employee, you will have an opportunity to engage in our employee-led communities such as Sustainability, Diversity, Equity and Inclusion, and Corporate Social Responsibility.

Christian Dior Couture provides equal employment opportunities to all employees as part of the LVMH Group, which attaches great importance to ensuring that its Maisons and their partners share a set of common rules, practices, and principles with respect to ethics, social responsibility, and protection of the environment.
Show more

title: Trainee, Human Resources
description:

Reports to: Director, Human Resources, Corporate

Job Purpose

The Dior Corporate Trainee participates in a program designed to identify and develop future talent for the organization. title: Management Trainee Program
description:
Empowering Tomorrow's Leaders Through Excellence and Innovation

Unlock your potential through KLK's Management Trainee Programme - a gateway to impactful careers and transformative learning.




The KLK Management Trainee Programme is a two-year structured development initiative designed to groom high-calibre graduates into future leaders.




This programme offers rotational exposure across diverse business area, complemented by special projects and assignments, enabling you to discover the best fit for your skills and aspirations.




WHAT WE OFFER:

On-the-Job Training and Projects

Gain practical experience through real business challenges.




Mentorship

Learn from seasoned professionals who guide your growth.




Experiential Learning & Knowledge Sharing

Participate in interactive sessions to broaden your perspective.




Career Counselling & Individual Feedback

Define clear career goals and actionable steps to achieve them.




Regular Monitoring

Scheduled follow-ups to ensure optimal progress.




Technical Expertise

Build strong functional knowledge.




Soft Skills Development

Enhance communication, leadership, and problem-solving abilities.




Eligibility Criteria

Fresh graduates or young professionals (≤ 2 years’ experience).
Minimum qualification: Honours Degree with Distinction / Magna Cum Laude / Second Class Upper / CGPA 3.5 and above in Economics, Business, Finance, or IT.
Passionate, energetic, and aligned with our Core Values: Teamwork, Humility, Results, Integrity, Innovation & Loyalty.




If you aspire to lead and inspire others, we want to meet you!




Successful candidates will be required to assume their official duties in June 2026.

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.

title: Management Trainee - Human Resource
company: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk - Noodle Division
description:
Persyaratan Pekerjaan


Laki laki dengan latar belakang pendidikan minimal sarjana hukum atau teknik industri
Memahami Undang-Undang Ketenagakerjaan
Berpengalaman dalam penggunaan software SAP dan mahir dalam penggunaan microsoft
Mampu bekerja dengan teliti, tekun, rapi, dan teratur
Bersedia bekerja di Purwakarta, Jawa Barat

Mengelola administrasi benefit karyawan (BPJS Kesehatan, BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, asuransi, tunjangan, dan fasilitas lainnya).

title: CHEVRON ARGENTINA - Intern Wells
location: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
description:
Chevron Argentina está aceptando postulantes para la posición de Intern Wells

Chevron es una de las principales empresas de energía del mundo, con aproximadamente 45,000 empleados a nivel global.

Las tareas a desarrollar por el/la pasante serán las siguientes:


Soporte a ingeniero senior en materia de diseño y planificación de trabajos de pozos.
Soporte en el manejo de la información y control de calidad de bases de datos:
Seguimiento de la información en reportes diarios de perforación y reparación de pozos, verificación, y chequeo de la calidad de la información.
Seguimientos de los tiempos no productivos y evaluación de tendencias.
Elaboración y análisis de reportes relacionados a las actividades de construcción y reparación de pozos.
Soporte en cuanto a la recolección de información y análisis de proyectos previos, programas de perforación y terminación no-convencional e intervenciones convencionales, analizando resultados y emitiendo recomendaciones.
Colaborará en el desarrollo de proyectos de mejora continua.
Automatización de procesos (presentaciones, cálculos, planillas de llenado periódico, etc)
Manejo de base de datos
Prestará asistencia al departamento de Wells en todo lo relativo a seguimiento de los proyectos desde el punto de vista de desempeño operacional.


Requisitos


Se prefiere un perfil orientado a programación y data analitics (Python, PowerBi, Macros y Querys de Excel)
Manejo de inglés avanzado/fluido
Estudiantes de carrera de Ing en Petroleo, Ing Quimica, Ing Mecánica, Ing en Programacion


Horas por semana: 20 horas.

Duración de la Pasantía: 12 meses, con la posibilidad de extenderse por 6 meses más.

Ubicación: Nuñez, CABA.

title: Business Management Trainee
description:
We are an expanding business management and consulting firm dedicated to helping organizations achieve sustainable growth and operational success. Our approach is centered on strategic thinking, measurable results, and long-term partnerships. We foster a professional environment grounded in accountability, teamwork, and innovation, where employees are encouraged to grow, develop new skills, and take initiative. We are currently looking for ambitious, driven individuals who are eager to build a strong foundation and grow into leadership roles over time.

Primary Responsibilities


Support the planning and execution of strategic business initiatives and operational improvements.
Work closely with senior managers to coordinate projects and monitor progress against objectives.
Perform in-depth research on markets, industry trends, and competitive landscapes.
Create comprehensive reports, client-facing materials, and executive presentations.
Attend client discussions, planning meetings, and strategic briefings.
Track project deadlines, deliverables, and key milestones to ensure timely completion.
Partner with various departments to align efforts and achieve company targets.
Interpret data to uncover insights, patterns, and growth opportunities.
Contribute to promotional strategies, branding activities, and campaign execution.
Provide support with financial planning, forecasting, and budget reviews.
Maintain consistent and professional communication with clients.
Build foundational expertise in business processes, leadership, and management practices.
Assist with training and integration of new hires when required.
Engage in professional development programs and internal team initiatives.
Keep accurate records and ensure all documentation is organized and up to date.


Candidate Profile


Bachelor’s degree in Business, Business Administration, or a related discipline.
Strong analytical thinking and organizational capabilities.
Clear and professional written and verbal communication skills.
Comfortable working in a collaborative, team-driven setting.
Basic knowledge of project management principles.
Detail-oriented with effective problem-solving skills.
Self-motivated and able to manage responsibilities in a dynamic environment.
Enthusiastic mindset with a readiness to embrace new opportunities.
Internship, co-op, or academic project experience in a business setting is beneficial.
Foundational understanding of budgeting and financial analysis concepts.
Dedicated to continuous growth, skill development, and long-term career progression.


If you’re looking for an opportunity that offers mentorship, hands-on experience, and a clear pathway for advancement, this role provides the ideal starting point for your professional journey.

Skills: management,leadership,communication,team collaboration

title: Design & Creative Content Intern
description:
GoodNews was born in Barcelona in 2020 (Covid-19), with the aim of bringing good vibes back to all neighborhoods. Since then, we have managed to bring our Good Vibes to 30 locations, more than 2,000 homes, and over 100 offices in Barcelona, Madrid, Amsterdam, and Paris.

Our mission is to lead the coffee and functional beverage revolution in Europe, inspiring an optimistic, healthy, and sustainable lifestyle. We are constantly growing and looking for authentic and positive people who share our values and goals. But above all, and most importantly, we are looking for authentic people with Good Vibes!

We are currently looking for a part-time intern to join our Marketing department who is passionate about visual design and content creation and wants to learn by doing in a real-world creative environment. This position reports directly to our Graphic Designer and involves 20% collaboration with the Creative Studio.

If you meet the requirements and would like to revolutionize the world of coffee from a sustainable perspective with a positive impact, we would love to meet you! 😊

TASKS TO BE PERFORMED:


Support the Graphic Designer in the development and production of graphic assets for various formats and channels.
Participate in the creation of visual content: posters, carousels, vinyl graphics, social media content, banners, etc.
Collaborate with the Creative Studio on campaigns, coordinating film shoots, photo shoots, and audiovisual and photographic production.
Adapt campaign assets to different formats and platforms.
Contribute to the brand’s visual consistency across all touchpoints.
Assist in researching references, mood boards, and creative directions.


REQUIREMENTS:


Student of Graphic Design, Audiovisual Communication, Advertising, or a related field.
Basic to intermediate proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign). Experience with Premiere, After Effects, or Figma is a plus.
Aesthetic sensibility and a keen eye for composition, color, and typography.
Ability to work in a team, accept constructive feedback, and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
Possibility of formalizing an internship agreement with a university or educational institution.
Proactivity, attention to detail, and a genuine desire to learn.


WHAT DO WE OFFER?


Paid internship
Opportunity to become an active member of a creative team.
Opportunity to learn directly from industry professionals.
Opportunity to be part of a young, rapidly expanding and developing company with endless opportunities to learn.
Highly motivated work environment.
& Good Coffee at all times! 😊


Are you interested? Do you meet the requirements? We want to get to know you!

GoodNews promotes an inclusive work environment based on equal opportunities and respect for diversity. All selection processes are conducted without discrimination on the basis of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or any other personal or social condition.
